The car suddenly warned and stopped abruptly while we were traveling over a steel plate on the road. There were no other hazards in the road and no other cars in front of us in our lane (there were cars oncoming in the opposite traffic lane, but none had crossed over into ours).

I've owned my car for 3 weeks and have driven it ~10 times in total.  On 2 different occasions (most recently yesterday), it has stalled out while standing in traffic.  On both occasions, it was a "soft stall" just as a vehicle with auto on/off would have.  I had no warning light

narrative.headline: What 2021 Volkswagen Jetta owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 64 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (38% of reports).
